mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate indicates accommodative monetary policy, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances despite FEDFUNDS below 4.5%

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals a tightening labor market, which typically precedes stronger corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 60% of cases when UNRATE is below 4.5%

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and non-farm payrolls (PAYEMS) indicates robust supply-side expansion and labor market strength, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative when both INDPRO and PAYEMS are rising

mechanism_narrative: During periods of strong consumer demand, rising residential construction (HOUST) and retail sales (RSAFS) signal increased corporate revenue, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative when both HOUST and RSAFS are rising during demand-driven periods

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in CPIAUCSL above 2.5% indicates rising inflation, which may prompt central bank tightening and negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) reflects robust supply-side activity, which typically correlates with positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative when INDPRO is rising

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates a strong economy, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative when both GDPC1 and INDPRO are rising

mechanism_narrative: In a monetary tightening cycle, rising federal funds rates (FEDFUNDS) correlate with negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive during monetary tightening periods despite rising FEDFUNDS
